# warpstream_client_metrics_subscriptions (Data Source)

This data source lists all client metrics subscriptions on a WarpStream Virtual Cluster.

The WarpStream provider must be authenticated with an application key to read this data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "warpstream_client_metrics_subscriptions" "all" {
  virtual_cluster_id = "vci_XXXXXXXXXX"
}

output "first_subscription_name" {
  value = data.warpstream_client_metrics_subscriptions.all.subscriptions.0.name
}

output "subscription_count" {
  value = length(data.warpstream_client_metrics_subscriptions.all.subscriptions)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `virtual_cluster_id` (String) ID of the Virtual Cluster whose subscriptions to list.

### Read-Only

- `subscriptions` (Attributes List) All client metrics subscriptions in the Virtual Cluster, sorted by `name`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subscriptions))

<a id="nestedatt--subscriptions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subscriptions`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Composite identifier in the form `<virtual_cluster_id>/<name>`.
- `interval_ms` (Number) Push interval in milliseconds, or null if not set on the subscription.
- `match` (String) Comma-separated list of `<key>=<regex>` client match selectors, or null if not set on the subscription.
- `metrics` (String) Comma-separated list of metric name prefixes, or null if not set on the subscription.
- `name` (String) Name of the subscription.
